name: Easy Hamburger Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Chopped cheddar or Swiss cheese (1/2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in microwave.
2. Drain fat and set aside.
3. Blend milk, mayonnaise, eggs, and cornstarch until smooth (I use my Cuisinart).
4. Stir in meat, cheese, onion, and pepper.
5. Turn filling into pastry shell.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until golden on top and knife inserted in center comes out clean. Serves 6.
